missing_expected_files: src/** (project uses top-level packages noesis/, tools/, app/, formal/ instead)

system_identity.system_type: Deterministic + LLM-assisted externalized-metacognition pipeline (a controlled state-transformation loop over text), shipped as the `noesis` CLI (44 subcommands) and a FastAPI service. NOT AGI, therapy, diagnosis, or consciousness detection.
system_identity.core_transformation: raw_text -> complexity -> adaptive mirror -> causal categories -> reality-map delta -> theory contribution -> EIIC -> action selection -> artifact -> 12 gates -> Evidence Bundle -> verdict; with a claim-to-source bibliographic evidence graph as a cross-cutting governance layer
system_identity.input_state: raw user text (intent-bearing natural language), file under examples/ or CLI arg
system_identity.output_state: Evidence Bundle (15 files in v0.8: manifest.json + per-stage JSON artifacts + validation.json + verdict.md) with overall_status PASS/FAIL, sha256 input_hash, deterministic/llm module split
system_identity.validation_boundary: 12 deterministic gates + jsonschema validation + forbidden-claim detector + hallucination-risk heuristic + provenance tagging + bibliographic evidence-graph gate; LLM output is advisory prose only and cannot pass a gate by itself

state_variables.name: intent_state
state_variables.definition: compressed intent vector extracted from raw text

state_variables.name: context_state
state_variables.definition: complexity profile + active causal categories + reality maps that condition downstream operators

state_variables.name: candidate_state
state_variables.definition: candidate actions / synthesis axes / node plans produced before gating

state_variables.name: claim_state
state_variables.definition: each high-level claim carries exactly one provenance tag (observed/inferred/speculative/forbidden) and, where applicable, a source edge in the bibliographic evidence graph

state_variables.name: evidence_state
state_variables.definition: persisted Evidence Bundle for a run (raw_input, per-stage artifacts, validation, verdict, manifest with input_hash)

state_variables.name: gate_state
state_variables.definition: pass/fail of each of the 12 gates incl. canonical IEV functional w = aR + bV + gP - dK >= theta

state_variables.name: artifact_state
state_variables.definition: stabilized 7- or 10-section artifact written to the bundle

state_variables.name: verification_state
state_variables.definition: ValidationReport per artifact type (fields, word-count, anchors, forbidden, hallucination, falsifier present)

state_variables.name: release_state
state_variables.definition: overall_status PASS/FAIL emitted by `noesis verdict <bundle>`, gating release of the run

state_variables.name: trajectory_state
state_variables.definition: an explicit per-operator stepwise trace (state_t, operation_t, score_t, decision_t, rollback_condition_t, state_t+1) for one run

boundary_conditions: every emitted artifact MUST validate against its jsonschema (jsonschema dependency, tests/test_reflection_schema.py)
every high-level claim MUST carry exactly one provenance tag {observed, inferred, speculative, forbidden} (noesis/provenance.py)
every literature-grounded claim MUST resolve to a source in the bibliographic evidence graph (noesis/bibliography.py, Gate coverage in tests/test_bibliography_coverage.py)
an artifact MUST pass all 12 gates for overall_status PASS (noesis/pipeline_v8.py)
extrapolated EIIC cores are force-tagged speculative (Gate 8) and cannot be reported as observed
ruff + mypy --strict + pytest with a >=90% coverage gate MUST be green in CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml)
forbidden_claims: consciousness detected / measured / system is conscious
medical diagnosis / healing / therapy / replaces clinician
validated brain model / validated neuroscience without data
non_scope: claims of subjective quality improvement without human evaluation (deferred to Phase 3 in VERDICT.md)
treating proxy benchmark rates as proof of usefulness

invariants.name: intent_coherence
invariants.must_conserve: downstream artifact stays aligned with the extracted intent vector
invariants.how_verified: intent_coherence_score in manifest (noesis/pipeline_v8.py) + signal/noise separation check in validators
invariants.failure_if_broken: mirror restates surface intent instead of hidden goal; gate fails, overall_status FAIL

invariants.name: claim_status_traceability
invariants.must_conserve: every high-level claim has exactly one provenance tag
invariants.failure_if_broken: speculative output presented as observed -> dishonest verdict

invariants.name: source_traceability
invariants.must_conserve: every literature-grounded claim maps to a real bibliographic source (claim-to-source evidence graph)
invariants.how_verified: noesis/bibliography.py validate/verdict + tests/test_bibliography_coverage.py + Gate 13 runtime guard
invariants.failure_if_broken: literature claim with no source -> citation theater; bibliography verdict FAIL

invariants.name: proxy_honesty
invariants.must_conserve: proxy metrics and named-operator 'theories' are labelled as proxies, never as implemented theory or as usefulness
invariants.how_verified: docs/THEORIES.md + VERDICT.md self-disclosure + ablation showing decorative layers
invariants.failure_if_broken: RQ3 (theory contribution) overclaimed without ablation/human eval

invariants.name: artifact_reproducibility
invariants.must_conserve: same raw input -> same run_id (sha256 input_hash) and same deterministic artifacts offline
invariants.how_verified: noesis/evidence.py run_id = sha256(raw)[:12]; deterministic modules listed in manifest
invariants.failure_if_broken: non-reproducible run; evidence bundle cannot be audited

invariants.name: human_responsibility
invariants.must_conserve: human keeps decision authority; tool is advisory; high-bandwidth review is measured not eliminated
invariants.how_verified: human_bottleneck_score + manual_gate_count in manifest; forbidden 'replaces human judgment'
invariants.failure_if_broken: tool framed as autonomous decider -> forbidden-claim violation

invariants.name: validation_evidence
invariants.must_conserve: no PASS verdict without a populated validation.json + passing gates
invariants.how_verified: noesis/verdict.py reads validation gates; overall_status derived from gate checks
invariants.failure_if_broken: green verdict on empty evidence -> false-green

invariants.name: entropy_gating
invariants.must_conserve: content admitted only if it preserves intent AND raises verified precision (w >= theta), else rejected
invariants.failure_if_broken: unweighted entropy enters the artifact; noise_rejection_score drops

operator_map.failure_mode: pads short inputs (compression metric honestly fails on short inputs per VERDICT.md)

operator_map.operation: w = aR + bV + gP - dK; accept if w >= theta
operator_map.failure_mode: mis-tuned weights admit noise or reject signal

operator_map.operation: build status-aware claim-to-source evidence graph; validate coverage
operator_map.failure_mode: literature claim without a resolvable source

operator_map.operation: persist run as Evidence Bundle with sha256 input_hash

operator_map.failure_mode: verdict on absent bundle raises FileNotFoundError (no graceful BLOCKED)

operator_map.operation: append stepwise trace record with score_t, decision_t, rollback_condition_t, state_t+1; replay-continuous by construction
operator_map.failure_mode: validate_trajectory fails if any executed operator is missing or continuity breaks

llm_residual_spaces: LLM not on the critical path; manifest records llm_modules (empty on deterministic offline runs)
mechanism_residual_split.promotion_rule: LLM/residual output is advisory and cannot become a mechanism truth without passing a deterministic gate + schema + provenance tag (+ a source edge for literature claims); enforced by architecture (LLM off critical path) and the bibliography gate, but NOT yet a single coded residual->mechanism promotion-gate test.

metrics.definition: alignment of artifact to extracted intent
fraction of entropy rejected by gates
fraction of runs with zero forbidden claims
fraction of artifacts passing all gates
fraction of literature claims with a resolvable source
fraction of operators with a validator
metrics.measurement_method: not computed; this audit estimates ~9/10 KEEP/MODIFY operators have validators

verifiers.command_or_file: jsonschema in tests/test_reflection_schema.py + this audit's test

verifiers.checks: claim-to-source evidence graph coverage + Gate 13 runtime guard
this report validates against its schema + gate assertions

repo_facts: 215 pytest pass with a >=90% coverage gate (92.61% observed), mypy --strict on 64 files, ruff clean (verified this run)
44 CLI subcommands incl. bibliography (validate/scan/missing/graph/verdict), pipeline-v8, verdict, benchmark, ablate
Evidence Bundle v0.8 emits 15 files with sha256 input_hash
bibliographic claim-to-source evidence graph (noesis/bibliography.py, data/bibliography.bib) with `noesis bibliography validate` exit 0
tested_claims: forbidden claims (AGI/consciousness/therapy/mysticism) are detected and block (noesis/forbidden.py + tests)
IEV gate functional w = aR+bV+gP-dK accepts iff w>=theta (tests/test_gate_math.py)
every literature claim resolves to a source (tests/test_bibliography_coverage.py)

compression is honestly tagged on short inputs: the v6 pipeline's adaptive mirror returns structured_not_compressed / expanded_by_request / failed_compression and never labels padding as 'compressed' (verified: `noesis mirror-adaptive` on a 2-word input -> structured_not_compressed)

category_layer is causal, not decorative: ablation (noesis.benchmark_v6.run_ablation_v6) removing it breaks gate3_reality_map_delta + gate9_ablation_delta and flips next_action_changed=True (verified empirically, 10/12 gates vs 12/12)
literature_claims: working memory (Cowan/Miller/Baddeley), cognitive control (Miller & Cohen, Badre), metacognition (Fleming & Lau), global workspace (Baars, Dehaene), free energy/active inference (Friston, Parr, Clark), distributed cognition (Hutchins, Clark & Chalmers) — all carried in the bibliographic evidence graph as S2/S3, not implementations
proxy_claims: 12 'theories' are text proxies, not EFE/Phi/homology implementations (self-disclosed in VERDICT.md and docs/THEORIES.md)
benchmark rates (claim_safety_rate=1.0 etc.) measure structural consistency, NOT subjective usefulness
IEV precision gate / bandwidth / cognitive dimensionality are heuristics labelled proxy (Gate 8)
speculative_claims: EIIC extrapolated_core / peak_architecture (force-tagged speculative by Gate 8)

first_missing_condition: Demonstrated subjective usefulness is still pending real human-labeled data: the feedback harness (noesis/feedback.py) is ready but returns INSUFFICIENT_DATA until ~15-20 labeled (input -> artifact -> works/fails) pairs exist; the proxy benchmark measures structural consistency, not demonstrated usefulness. The two prior v0.5 limitations (compression mislabel, decorative category layer) are resolved in v0.6 and verified.

role_2_handoff.task: Add a deterministic per-operator trajectory trace persisted into the Evidence Bundle, with one schema-validated record per pipeline step and a verifier that proves the trace is complete and replay-ordered.
pass_fail_criteria: out/trajectory_trace.json exists and validates against schemas/trajectory_trace.schema.json
trace contains one ordered record per executed operator with fields trace_id, state_t, operation_t, candidate_t, score_t, decision_t, artifact_delta_t, rollback_condition_t, state_t_plus_1
records are monotonically ordered and state_t_plus_1[n] == state_t[n+1] (replay continuity)
the new test fails if any executed operator is missing from the trace
pytest + ruff + mypy all green and the >=90% coverage gate holds
